name: nl-ez-plugin
description: Branded Claude Code plugin for Ministerie van Economische Zaken en Klimaat (nl-ez). Composes Dutch government data intelligence (nl-gov-data MCP — Tweede Kamer, Rijksoverheid, KOOP, BWB, Wetgevingskalender, Rechtspraak, CBS, plus nl-issue-framing, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-tensions) with server-side branded document formatting (stromy-format) and deliverable planning (deliverable-canvas), over the nl-ez client-data brand overlay.
